hypothesis: If the novel single-agent extraction pipeline is used, then the end-to-end extraction F1 score across all dataset features for nanozymes and chelate complexes will be higher than those achieved by baseline GPT-5, GPT-5 Thinking, ChatGPT Agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems, because the pipeline enforces structured markdown output and integrates multimodal image captioning to improve schema compliance and reduce information loss.
